name: Easyship Multi-Carrier Shipping API
what_it_does: Easyship REST API for multi-carrier shipping rate shopping and fulfillment platform. Enables AI agents to compare shipping rates across 250+ couriers globally, handle shipment label generation and booking, access customs documentation and HS code classification, retrieve duty and tax calculation for cross-border shipments, manage shipment tracking across all carriers, handle returns management and label generation, access packaging optimization and box selection, retrieve shipping analytics and cost reporting, manage warehouse and fulfillment workflows, and integrate multi-carrier shipping with e-commerce platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce, Amazon).
use_cases: Comparing multi-carrier shipping rates from e-commerce fulfillment agents
Generating shipping labels and booking from order automation agents
Accessing customs documentation and duty calculation from international shipping agents
Integrating shipping with Shopify and WooCommerce from e-commerce operations agents
not_for: Enterprise logistics requiring custom carrier contracts without rate shopping
Freight shipping without parcel and small package focus
Carriers and logistics providers (not for carrier-to-carrier)
best_when: An e-commerce merchant or marketplace using Easyship wants AI agents to automate shipping rate selection, label generation, customs compliance, tracking, and carrier performance analytics.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: Automated carrier selection must account for transit time SLAs not just cost — low-cost slow shipping for time-sensitive orders damages customer experience. Customs duty calculation errors can cause shipments to be held or refused. Automated label generation for dangerous goods requires compliance verification.

auth.notes: Easyship uses API tokens for REST API access. Account-level API token authentication. Comprehensive developer documentation at developers.easyship.com. Webhooks for shipment tracking events. Strong Shopify, WooCommerce, Amazon, and eBay integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: 100 shipments/month; paid tiers for higher volume
pricing.notes: Singapore. Founded 2014. Multi-carrier shipping platform for e-commerce. $75M+ in funding. 100,000+ merchants. 250+ courier integrations. Strong Asia-Pacific cross-border shipping. Used for international e-commerce from US, EU, and APAC. Competes with Shippo and Shipstation for multi-carrier shipping.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; rate shopping throttled

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: Rate-shopping for cheapest carrier — balance cost with transit time for customer experience
API token auth only — no OAuth or scoped access; protect token carefully
No public MCP server — REST API with developer documentation
HS code classification for customs — automated classification should be reviewed for accuracy to prevent customs holds
Dangerous goods restrictions — automated shipping agent must check DG restrictions before booking
Carrier rate shopping may return 200+ options — agent needs filtering logic for delivery time and price tradeoffs
agent_readiness.security_notes: Shipping and customs data. SOC2, GDPR. API token. Multi-region. Shipment data and customs documentation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Multi-carrier shipping data. SOC2, GDPR. API token. Multi-region. Shipment and customs data.
